One day, a robot named Robby was walking in the park. He saw a
little girl named Sue. Sue was sad because she lost her toy...
[Seq 1] "The little girl looked up at the sky and"
...saw a big blue bird. She smiled and waved her arms. The bird
flew away and the little girl started to laugh...
...wanted to be successful. He was determined to do something
